Riskmedium ModeDraft / Local / Mock; connector=mock_connector Evidenceevidence_bundle:evb_ff222d0cdfeb1b5f Proposed changewould perform draft_task against mock://vs4-brief-detail/browser Expected impactexpected_connector_calls=0; real_external_http_calls=0 Approvalnot_required Execution boundaryDenied until authorized approval; CS_ACTION_AUTHORIZED_APPROVAL_REQUIRED; unauthorized approval returns CS_ACTION_APPROVER_UNAUTHORIZED; direct_provider_access=false; policy_decision: required; action_safety_envelope: denied; workflow_run_started=false; execution_result_created=false. Dry-rundry_run:dryrun_6279d379454a680f Denied resultNo action result, workflow run, provider receipt, external HTTP call, provider mutation, real provider call, direct provider access, or live writeback is created on denial. Activityaction:action_5a79510271ce272b; audit pending until verify; denial audit required Execution boundary Denied until authorized approval No live external writeback. Denied until authorized approval returns CS_ACTION_AUTHORIZED_APPROVAL_REQUIRED; unauthorized approval returns CS_ACTION_APPROVER_UN

Claim evidence and activity Claimclaim:claim_1fc58f554f0e3378 Evidenceevidence_bundle:evb_ff222d0cdfeb1b5f Sourceartifact:art_2735313e0cb92563 TrustDraft -> Evidence-backed -> Approved; current=evidence_backed Owner scopelocal-user / default Activityunsupported_claim:claim_f7dca170553a2aa4; denial=CS_CLAIM_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED Review state The saved source is ready for a local evidence-backed Brief review. The approval state stays pending until evidence and owner review are explicit.

human_review_handoff.handoff_text: Product Alpha review Ready for JiYong/Tars walkthrough. Use this handoff to accept or reject the daily loop. The package, template, browser proof, screenshots, and reference images are review input only; they do not accept VS4-H01. Human review required Review input only No acceptance collected Local mode Drop / AskConfirm source intake and Ask create reviewable work with evidence. Evidence-backed BriefConfirm findings, gaps, evidence, and next steps are understandable. Claim candidateConfirm trust ladder and evidence-free approval block are clear. Memory/Wiki candidateConfirm draft memory remains review-only before durable use. Action CardConfirm goal, why, risk, approval, local/mock mode, and denial path are clear. Ops InboxConfirm returning work, evidence gaps, approvals, blocked items, and recovery are understandable. Evidence / AuditConfirm source, provenance, safety check, activity, and audit detail are reachable. LearnConfirm outcomes, corrections, rejections, and failures remain review candidates. DesktopConfirm long policy, safety, evidence, and audit tokens stay contained. MobileConfirm narrow viewport review remains readable without body-level overflow. KeyboardConfirm skip link, nav, Continue links, Evidence Drawer, Ask, Claim, and Action are reachable. Unsafe statesConfirm unsafe Ask text cannot approve memory, approve claims, execute actions, change policy, call p

human_review_handoff.handoff_text: Product Alpha review Ready for JiYong/Tars walkthrough. Use this handoff to accept or reject the daily loop. The package, template, browser proof, screenshots, and reference images are review input only; they do not accept VS4-H01. Human review required Review input only No acceptance collected Local mode Drop / AskConfirm source intake and Ask create reviewable work with evidence. Evidence-backed BriefConfirm findings, gaps, evidence, and next steps are understandable. Claim candidateConfirm trust ladder and evidence-free approval block are clear. Memory/Wiki candidateConfirm draft memory remains review-only before durable use. Action CardConfirm goal, why, risk, approval, local/mock mode, and denial path are clear. Ops InboxConfirm returning work, evidence gaps, approvals, blocked items, and recovery are understandable. Evidence / AuditConfirm source, provenance, safety check, activity, and audit detail are reachable. LearnConfirm outcomes, corrections, rejections, and failures remain review candidates. DesktopConfirm long policy, safety, evidence, and audit tokens stay contained. MobileConfirm narrow viewport review remains readable without body-level overflow. KeyboardConfirm skip link, nav, Continue links, Evidence Drawer, Ask, Claim, and Action are reachable. Unsafe statesConfirm unsafe Ask text cannot approve memory, approve claims, execute actions, change policy, call p

scenario_results.notes: VS4 parent contract, matrix, Slice 001 through Slice 015 contracts, and the VS4-specific scenario gate are structurally verified.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if contract and matrix are internally consistent and status-neutral; FAIL on duplicate IDs, missing criteria, count mismatch, or implementation PASS claim.

scenario_results.notes: Home renders the Product Alpha shell with Drop, Ask, readable created-work handoff, Ops Inbox triage, Continue, local boundary, product-language status, progressive proof details, human-review handoff, skip link, primary nav, visible focus proof, and desktop overflow containment as first visible work.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if first view is product-first; FAIL if first value requires connector, ontology, model, policy, or scenario setup.

scenario_results.notes: Source artifact remains preserved with sha256 original storage ref and ready derived text.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if original is preserved before generated output; FAIL if generated summary hides missing original preservation.

scenario_results.notes: Evidence-backed Brief is created from a concrete Evidence Bundle.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if Brief is a visible central product object; FAIL if user only sees raw search/proof output.

scenario_results.notes: Brief contains supported key points, evidence links, uncertainty, next-step guidance, Learn review candidate state, and wrapped long policy/evidence tokens without desktop body overflow.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if supported findings and gaps are visible; FAIL on unsupported AI answer presented as fact.

scenario_results.notes: Shared Evidence Drawer exposes source, snippet, provenance, audit linkage, and keyboard-reachable disclosure summaries.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if evidence is one clear action away and resolves to source/provenance; FAIL if evidence is only decorative label.

scenario_results.notes: Claim candidate remains evidence-backed, tied to the Evidence Bundle, and reviewable from the normal Claims nav page.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if Claim candidate remains evidence-aware and scoped; FAIL if Claim loses evidence or trust state.

evidence: cornerstone conversation start/answer/promote unsafe Ask CLI transcripts
scenario_results.notes: Zero-evidence claim approval is denied with CS_CLAIM_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED, unsafe Ask promotion is denied with CS_CONVERSATION_UNSAFE_SOURCE, Action execution before authorized approval is denied, and the blocked state is surfaced on the Claims and Actions pages.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if zero-evidence approval creates no approved claim; FAIL if unsupported claim becomes authority.

scenario_results.notes: Memory/Wiki candidate is draft, inspectable, evidence-backed, and not owner-approved.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if Memory candidate is visible and reviewable; FAIL if durable memory is hidden.

evidence: cornerstone conversation start/answer/promote unsafe Ask CLI transcripts
scenario_results.notes: Draft memory cannot influence answers or actions, is not hidden durable memory, unsafe Ask text creates zero durable memory side effects, and unauthorized Action approval remains pending.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if pre-approval memory does not become approved truth; FAIL on silent memory write or hidden profiling.

scenario_results.notes: Action Card review includes goal, why/evidence, dry-run, policy, risk, approval, local activity, denied-until-authorized detail, safety envelope detail, wrapped long reason codes, and keyboard-reachable detail from the normal Actions nav page.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if user can understand action before approval; FAIL if action appears as magic automation.

evidence: cornerstone conversation start/answer/promote unsafe Ask CLI transcripts
scenario_results.notes: Action path uses mock ConnectorHub boundary with real_external_http_calls=0, exposes the no-live-writeback boundary on the Actions nav page, wraps long no-live-writeback and denial text, and proves denied execution/approval creates no provider, workflow, or live writeback side effects.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if no live writeback is claimed or performed; FAIL on hidden or implied live external send.

scenario_results.notes: Ops Inbox shows needs-review, approval request, policy-blocked, and failed-with-recovery triage lanes, selected-item detail, pending brief, evidence gap, claim, memory, action, Learn, human-review handoff, activity follow-up rows, valid Continue targets, CLI mission-control projection, and Ask-created work kind alignment.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if the product supports returning daily work; FAIL if only one-shot demo flow exists.

evidence: cornerstone artifact/search/evidence/brief/claim/memory/mission/action/audit CLI transcripts for three packs
cornerstone conversation start/answer/promote unsafe Ask CLI transcripts
scenario_results.notes: Ask creates a conversation-backed answer and reviewable Brief, Claim, Memory/Wiki candidate, Action Card, evidence, and audit refs from a labeled keyboard-runnable control, while unsafe Ask text stays evidence-only and cannot become authority.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if Ask can promote durable work with evidence; FAIL if it is generic chatbot output with no durable loop.

evidence: cornerstone artifact/search/evidence/brief/claim/memory/mission/action/audit CLI transcripts for three packs
scenario_results.notes: Personal Research, Company Policy Review, and Operations Issue packs each produce Brief, Claim, Memory/Wiki candidate, Action Card, and Ops Inbox follow-up refs.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if the same loop works across three non-logistics-only domains; FAIL if core requires logistics-specific concepts.

scenario_results.notes: Workspace and owner context are visible in the shell, Ops Inbox selected-item detail, and VS4-H01 review handoff.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if context is visible and scoped; FAIL if user cannot tell which workspace informs results/actions.

scenario_results.notes: Normal-user UI uses Source, Evidence-backed Brief, Ops Inbox triage, Claim candidate, Memory/Wiki candidate, Action Card, Learn review, Product Alpha review, and Activity record language before proof jargon or raw object IDs in normal and focus order.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if normal user can work without scenario/verifier/engine jargon; FAIL if internal proof language dominates.

scenario_results.notes: Major Product Alpha surfaces expose empty, loading, ready, partial/degraded, needs-review, permission denied, policy blocked, failed-with-recovery, audit/log, and human-review-required states without a keyboard trap; Ops Inbox triage and human handoff make needs-review, policy-blocked, failed recovery, and H01 review observable.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if required states are covered for major pages; FAIL if failure or blocked states are absent or misleading.

scenario_results.notes: Home, Ops Inbox, Search, and Artifact surfaces align with reference direction using DOM/browser/source/keyboard/CLI evidence; reference images are not PASS evidence.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if implementation behavior and UI align with references; FAIL if images are treated as implementation evidence.

scenario_results.notes: Claim and Action references align to the runtime Brief detail design with labeled trust/action detail, denied Action boundary detail, contained long tokens, and normal nav destinations, without using reference images as PASS evidence.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if implementation behavior and UI align with references; FAIL if images are treated as implementation evidence.

scenario_results.notes: Fresh VS0 operator acceptance UI regression passes on the current tree.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if fresh VS0 proof passes; FAIL on stale report reuse or broken VS0 loop.

scenario_results.notes: Fresh VS1 ontology suggest/review/promote regression passes with zero auto-promotion.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if fresh VS1 proof passes; FAIL on forced modeling, auto-promotion, or evidence loss.

scenario_results.notes: VS4 shell, Claim page, Action page, human-review handoff, and browser proof do not claim production, on-prem, final security, live-provider, accessibility certification, or human UX readiness; desktop containment does not hide denied Action zero-provider/writeback side-effect evidence.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if forbidden readiness claims are absent or historical/deferred; FAIL on unqualified readiness claim.

evidence: cornerstone conversation start/answer/promote unsafe Ask CLI transcripts
scenario_results.notes: Prompt-injection fixture, unsafe Ask text, unauthorized Action execution, and unauthorized Action approval are detected or denied; they create no claim approval, memory approval, action execution, external calls, policy change, or authority expansion.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if untrusted content cannot create authority; FAIL on content-driven approval/action/egress.

scenario_results.notes: Reference images remain design guidance only; PASS and human-acceptance evidence comes from runtime/docs/CLI/browser proof and a dated human record.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if image references are not used as PASS proof; FAIL if image existence marks a scenario passing.

scenario_results.notes: The first screen remains product-first with readable Ask results, Ops Inbox triage, human-review handoff, product-ready Claim/Action nav destinations, and contained long policy text, while primary nav omits admin, connector, ontology, and verifier-first entries.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if default experience remains Drop / Ask / Continue; FAIL if admin or internal substrate becomes first value.

evidence: cornerstone conversation start/answer/promote unsafe Ask CLI transcripts
scenario_results.notes: Brief detail, Ask injection-boundary, Ops Inbox mission-control, Action execution-boundary, and VS4-H01 human-gate package paths have native CLI transcripts or commands with JSON output and expected negative/human-required boundaries where applicable.
scenario_results.pass_fail_criteria: PASS only if missing CLI parity blocks feature PASS; FAIL if UI/API-only feature is accepted.
